## Provenance Checklist

- [ ] Every added or changed shader has a valid `shader.json`
- [ ] Every adapted or ported shader links back to the exact upstream source artifact
- [ ] Every adapted or ported shader records a revision or snapshot marker
- [ ] Every adapted or ported shader records the upstream license and author names
- [ ] Every adapted or ported shader includes a `requiredNotice` for downstream attribution
- [ ] I ran `bun run check`
